_meta.note: CA federal House continuation batch CA-19 through CA-22 incumbents: (1) Jimmy Panetta CA-19 D 5th-term — son of Leon Panetta; New Dem + Progressive + Problem Solvers + Equality Caucus member; Heritage Action 0% / lifetime 5%; SBA F + NARAL 100% + PPAF endorsed 2022+2026; **HARD-TRUE cross-party deviation foreign_policy_restraint q0 (Article I)** cosponsor 2020 Iran WPR H.Con.Res.83 + June 2026 Iran WPR follow-up after Trump strikes ('no military force against Iran without Congress approval'); **NOT Freedom Caucus / RSC** — Main Street Caucus member, RG2-adjacent moderate; Heritage Action 83% / ILA 73% / lifetime 68.47% with Tax & Fiscal 23% + Individual Liberties 33% ('falls short of expectations for R+15 seat' per ILA flag) + TPAction Taxes & Spending 57.14% (weak fiscal hawkery); TPAction Border + Election Integrity + 2A + Health/Medical Freedom + American Culture all 100%; SBA Pro-Life endorsed 2024; NRA + CRPA endorsed (NRA life member); AIPAC endorsed + >$50K; HARD-TRUE life q0 post-Dobbs statement 'the lives of our most vulnerable is sacred and precious...we must protect the sanctity of life' + Assembly N on SCA 10 + N on SB 245 free abortion coverage; HARD-TRUE life q4 SBA endorsement + RFFA 0-of-5 anti-RFFA Assembly record + no PP/NARAL/EMILY $; HARD-TRUE biblical_marriage q2 Assembly N on SB 132 trans-inmates-in-women's-prisons; SOFT-FALSE biblical_marriage q4 Assembly Y on AB 2521 Transgender/GNC/Intersex Wellness & Equity Fund Chapter 869 2022 (60-0 concurrence pass-through); HARD-TRUE family q1 Assembly N on SB 866 minor-vaccine-without-parental-consent; HARD-TRUE family q2 N on AB 101 Ethnic Studies LGBTQ+ studies vehicle; HARD-TRUE econ q0 YES on H.R.1919 Anti-CBDC Surveillance State Act July 17 2025 (RC 201); HARD-FALSE econ q2 ILA Tax & Fiscal 23% + OBBBA HR 1 YES adding ~$3-4T deficit per CBO; HARD-TRUE self_def q1 TPAction 2A 100% + NRA endorsed + CRPA endorsed + lifetime NRA member; HARD-FALSE foreign_policy q3 AIPAC endorsed + >$50K AIPAC PAC giving per TrackAIPAC; SOFT-FALSE industry_capture q0 authored AB 1064 Oct 8 2021 expanding pharmacist authority to independently initiate/administer FDA-approved vaccines without prescriber protocol (signed Newsom — pro-access posture against informed-consent direction); (3) Jim Costa CA-21 D 10th-term — Blue Dog Coalition member (former Comms/Admin/Policy Chair) + Catholic dairy farmer + multi-decade CA Assembly/Senate; Heritage Action 0% / lifetime 9% / ILA 30.77 2025 / NumbersUSA F career; PPAF endorsed 2026 + NARAL/Equality CA 100% + RFMA YES + Equality Act cosponsor + 2006 NO on marriage amendment + WHPA HR 3755 117th cosponsor + 2005+2007 YES on embryonic stem cell + AWB Act 2021 cosponsor + Federal Extreme Risk Protection Order Act + Bipartisan Safer Communities YES + HR 6 Dream and Promise YES; HARD-FALSE industry_capture q0 Aug 2021 'do your part' press conference urging mandatory vaccinations + regular testing + mask mandates; multiple Blue Dog crossovers DOCUMENTED but mostly don't map to TRUE direction cells (Laken Riley HR 29 YES Jan 7 2025 = detention not deportation; Saudi/Yemen 2018 YES to block = NOT Article-I restraint; Iran June 2026 weak ALTERNATIVE resolution with Gottheimer permitting ~one-month hostilities = NOT restraint, FALSE on Article-I; Al Green censure Mar 2025 YES + DC criminal code rejection Feb 2023 + Keystone XL 2015 + PLCAA 2005); (4) David Valadao CA-22 R 6th-term — **chairman Republican Governance Group (RG2/Tuesday Group) Dec 2024** explicit moderate-GOP caucus leadership + Main Street Partnership + Problem Solvers; Catholic Portuguese-American Hanford dairy farmer; Heritage Action 46% / lifetime 47% **bottom-quartile R caucus**; SBA Pro-Life A+ + RFFA 0%; HARD-TRUE life q0 debate quote 'I am pro-life. I do support the exceptions. Rape, incest, the life of the mother. And I do support IVF'; SOFT-FALSE life q1 explicitly refuses 15-week federal abortion ban ('left up to the state') + 2024 dropped Life at Conception Act cosponsorship in competitive race; HARD-FALSE life q2 publicly supports IVF (embryo creation/discard implicated); **3 HARD-FALSE CROSS-PARTY DEVIATIONS on biblical_marriage** RFMA HR 8404 YES Roll Call 373 July 19 2022 federalizing SSM (1 of 47 R crossovers); HARD-TRUE biblical_marriage q2 HR 28 Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act YES Roll Call 12 Jan 14 2025 Title IX biological-sex; SOFT-FALSE biblical_marriage q4 2016 LGBT-federal-contractor protection YES; HARD-TRUE family q1 HR 5 Parents Bill of Rights cosponsor + YES Roll Call 161 Mar 24 2023; HARD-TRUE border q0 HR 2 Secure the Border YES Roll Call 209 May 11 2023; **HARD-FALSE border q1 CROSS-PARTY DEVIATION** DIGNIDAD Act 2025 HR 4393 cosponsor pathway to legal status for ~10-12M illegals + 2014 NO on DACA dismantling + Dream and Promise YES + Farm Workforce Modernization YES + family separation opposition June 2018; SOFT-TRUE border q3 HR 2 includes mandatory E-Verify (with ag carveout caveat); HARD-TRUE self_def q0 HR 38 Constitutional Concealed Carry Reciprocity cosponsor 119th; SOFT-TRUE self_def q1 NOT among 8 Rs voting YES Equality Act + NRA-PVF historically endorsed 2016; SOFT-FALSE foreign_policy q1 Ukraine aid YES + 'stands with Ukraine'; Trump 2nd impeachment YES Jan 13 2021 (1 of 10) + OBBBA YES July 3 2025 despite Medicaid concerns. **SKIPS:** mike-thompson (3-way slug collision MS/CA/KS — 9th consecutive defer; engine cannot disambiguate by slug; needs manual rename intervention — BLOCKER); vacant-ca-14 (placeholder seat, no person to score; Wahab/Hernandez advanced to Nov 3 2026 special).

set.office: U.S. Representative CA-19 (sworn in Jan 3, 2017 · 5th term · 2026 reelection · son of Leon Panetta)

profile.religion: Catholic heritage (father Catholic; JD Santa Clara Law, Jesuit institution); no personal faith profession located
profile.background: James Varni 'Jimmy' Panetta, son of Leon Panetta (former SecDef + CIA Director + WH Chief of Staff + Rep CA-16). BA Int'l Relations UC Davis; JD Santa Clara Law. U.S. Navy Reserve intelligence officer 2003-2011, Afghanistan tour 2007 with JSOC, Bronze Star. Former Deputy DA Monterey County + Alameda County prosecutor. Wife Carrie McIntyre (Monterey County Superior Court judge); two daughters. Sworn to U.S. House Jan 2017. 119th committees: Budget; Ways & Means (Trade subcommittee). Caucuses: New Democrat Coalition + Congressional Progressive Caucus + Problem Solvers + Congressional Equality Caucus + Climate Solutions + Medicare for All + For Country (co-founder).

jimmy-panetta.notes_set: Heritage Action 119th 0% / lifetime 5% (118th 5%, 117th 0%, 116th 0%) — center-left coastal CA D with Progressive + New Dem + Equality + For Country caucus footprint. SBA Pro-Life F + NARAL 100% + PPAF endorsed 2022 + 2026. AIPAC ecosystem $295K-$338K+ cumulative ($204,700 in 2023-24 alone) per KQED + Bought By Zionism trackers. HARD-FALSE life: pro-choice quoted 'this ruling strips women of their freedom to make their own decisions' (Dobbs response); WHPA HR 3755/HR 12 original cosponsor; PPAF endorsed 2022 + 2026; SBA F grade. HARD-FALSE marriage: YES on Respect for Marriage Act HR 8404 Roll Call 373 Dec 8 2022 + original cosponsor Equality Act + Congressional Equality Caucus + 'so much more needs to be done for LGBT equality' quote. SOFT-FALSE family: NO on HR 5 Parents Bill of Rights Roll Call 161 Mar 24 2023 (213-208, all Ds nay) + Equality Act cosponsor codifies SOGI in K-12. SOFT-FALSE christian_liberty: Equality Act removes RFRA defense for faith-based providers in covered areas. HARD-FALSE econ q0: NO on CBDC Anti-Surveillance State Act May 2024 (192 D-bloc Nay — Panetta among them per Monterey Times). SOFT-FALSE election: cosponsor HR 1 For the People Act expanding mail/online registration. HARD-FALSE border q1: YES on HR 6 American Dream and Promise Act (Dreamer pathway). HARD-FALSE border q2: 2026-01-30 'I'm not going to be complicit when it comes to ICE' statement + defended Santa Cruz sanctuary status publicly. HARD-FALSE self-defense: voted for HR 8/HR 1446 UBC Mar 2021; authored Federal Extreme Risk Protection Order Act (red-flag); AWB Act + high-cap mag ban cosponsor. **HARD-TRUE foreign_policy_restraint q0 CROSS-PARTY DEVIATION**: cosponsor + lead D-vet author of Iran War Powers Resolutions (Jan 2020 H.Con.Res.83 + June 2026 follow-up with Gottheimer/Moulton/Cuellar) — explicit Article-I framing 'no military force against Iran without Congress approval.' SOFT-TRUE q1: sponsored Yemen withdrawal resolution Feb 2019 + Iran disengagement framing. HARD-FALSE q2: 1 of 45 Ds joining ALL Rs to SANCTION ICC over Netanyahu/Gallant arrest warrants Jan 2025 (cross-direction interventionist vote, but contrary to restraint rubric). HARD-FALSE q3: ~$295-338K AIPAC ecosystem ($204,700 in 2023-24 cycle) per KQED + TrackAIPAC. **HARD-FALSE industry_capture q0**: March 2021 letter to Biden urging WAIVER OF INFORMED CONSENT to force COVID vaccines on U.S. troops — striking from a Navy vet member (UPI/Navy Times documented).

3.note: AIPAC ecosystem $295,146-$338,000+ cumulative ($204,700 in 2023-24 alone) per KQED + Bought-By-Zionism — opposite of never accepting AIPAC/foreign-linked PAC. HARD.

set.office: U.S. Representative CA-20 (sworn in May 2024 special · 2024 + 2026 reelection · ex-CA Assembly Vice Chair Approps 2016-2024 · McCarthy district director ~10 yrs)

profile.religion: Protestant (Wikipedia member infobox; no specific congregation or personal Christ-profession publicly stated)
profile.background: Vincent Cheng Fong, BA Political Science UCLA; MPA Princeton (Woodrow Wilson). Married Amanda Boschma March 11 2023 (met at Bakersfield Angels foster-care nonprofit); at least one son. Worked as district director for Kevin McCarthy ~10 years before Assembly. CA State Assembly Dec 2016-May 2024 (AD 34 then AD 32, Vice Chair Appropriations). Won McCarthy seat May 2024 special; reelected Nov 2024 (65.1% def. Boudreaux). 119th committees: Science Space & Technology (Environment + Investigations subcomm); Transportation & Infrastructure (Aviation + Railroads/Pipelines); Homeland Security (Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Protection). Caucuses: Western Caucus + Dutch Caucus (co-chair) + **Main Street Caucus** (centrist R); NOT Freedom Caucus or Republican Study Committee.

vince-fong.notes_set: Heritage Action 119th 83% / lifetime 87%. Institute for Legislative Analysis 2025 73% / lifetime 68.47% — flagged 'falls short of expectations for a Republican representing CA-20 (R+15)'; Tax & Fiscal 23% + Individual Liberties 33% (~7 points below R caucus 80% average). TPAction overall 75.96 / 2026 session 72.81 — Border 100% + Election Integrity 100% + 2A 100% + Health/Medical Freedom 100% + Educational Freedom 83.33% + American Culture 76.42% + Taxes & Spending **57.14%** (notable weak). Main Street Caucus pragmatist, NOT movement-conservative. Endorsed by SBA Pro-Life 2024, NRA-PVF (lifetime NRA member), CRPA, California Pro-Life Council 2018, AIPAC (>$50K). HARD-TRUE life q0 post-Dobbs statement 'the lives of our most vulnerable is sacred and precious. It is my firm conviction that we must protect the sanctity of life' (KGET) + 'pro-life policies in Congress' (GVWire). HARD-TRUE life q4 SBA Pro-Life endorsement + RFFA 0-of-5 anti-RFFA Assembly record (incl Assembly N on SCA 10 codifying abortion in CA constitution + N on SB 245 free elective abortion coverage). HARD-TRUE biblical_marriage q2 Assembly N on SB 132 trans-inmates-in-women's-prisons. SOFT-FALSE biblical_marriage q4 Assembly Y on AB 2521 Transgender/GNC/Intersex Wellness & Equity Fund Chapter 869 2022 (60-0 Assembly concurrence pass-through — structural, NOT affirmative leadership; per cite-only this is on-record Y for taxpayer-funded TGI programming). SOFT-TRUE family q0 publicly called on Newsom to opt CA into federal Education Freedom Tax Credit + YES on OBBBA HR 1 which contained federal scholarship-tax-credit vehicle. HARD-TRUE family q1 Assembly N on SB 866 minor-vaccines-without-parental-consent. HARD-TRUE family q2 Assembly N on AB 101 Ethnic Studies LGBTQ+ studies vehicle. HARD-TRUE econ q0 YES on HR 1919 Anti-CBDC Surveillance State Act July 17 2025 RC 201 (passed 219-217). HARD-FALSE econ q2 ILA Tax & Fiscal 23% + OBBBA YES adding ~$3-4T per CBO + no BBA cosponsorship. SOFT-TRUE election q1 TPAction Election Integrity 100% (implies SAVE Act / proof-of-citizenship support per TP rubric). SOFT-TRUE border q0 'end illegal immigration' platform + TPAction Border 100% + serves Homeland Security Cybersecurity subcomm. SOFT-TRUE self_def q0 HR 38 Constitutional Concealed Carry Reciprocity 2025 cosponsor. HARD-TRUE self_def q1 TPAction 2A 100% + NRA endorsed + CRPA endorsed + lifetime NRA member. HARD-FALSE foreign_policy q3 AIPAC officially endorsed + >$50K AIPAC-affiliated PAC giving per TrackAIPAC + 'We stand with Israel' Instagram. SOFT-FALSE industry_capture q0 authored AB 1064 signed Newsom Oct 8 2021 expanding pharmacist authority to independently initiate + administer FDA-approved vaccines for age 3+ without prescriber protocol (pro-access posture, not informed-consent). HETERODOX-CONSERVATIVE-CONCERNS: Main Street Caucus chairmanship trajectory + ILA + TPAction fiscal weakness flag this as a centrist-R seat-holder, not a movement-conservative; pro-life is firm but pro-vaccine-access posture cuts the other way on industry-capture.

0.note: Post-Dobbs on-record statement 'The lives of our most vulnerable is sacred and precious. It is my firm conviction that we must protect the sanctity of life'; campaign quote 'The policies that I've supported in the Assembly have been pro-life, and I will continue supporting pro-life policies in Congress.' Aligns with affirming life from conception. HARD.

4.note: RFFA scored 0-of-5 against their position; SBA Pro-Life endorsed 2024; Assembly N on SCA 10 + N on SB 245; no PP/NARAL/EMILY's List PAC giving in cited sources. HARD.

2.note: As Assemblymember voted N on SB 132 (placing transgender inmates in women's prisons by gender-identity self-ID). Per CA Family Voter Guide rubric: opposing position aligns with affirming biological sex as immutable. HARD.

4.note: Assembly Y on AB 2521 Transgender/Gender Nonconforming/Intersex Wellness & Equity Fund Chapter 869 2022 (CA Family Voter Guide flagged anti-conservative position; concurrence passed 60-0 with no R opposition so pass-through, not affirmative). SOFT.

0.note: Publicly called on Gov. Newsom to opt CA into federal Education Freedom Tax Credit / school-choice program ('support real educational choice for California families — so every child can succeed'); YES on OBBBA HR 1 which contained federal scholarship-tax-credit vehicle. SOFT-TRUE.

1.note: As Assemblymember voted N on SB 866 (allowing minors to consent to vaccines without parental knowledge/consent). HARD.

2.note: As Assemblymember voted N on AB 101 Ethnic Studies graduation requirement (bundled LGBTQ+ studies vehicle widely critiqued as CRT/SOGI). HARD.

0.note: YES on HR 1919 Anti-CBDC Surveillance State Act July 17 2025 RC 201 (passed 219-217). HARD.

2.note: ILA Tax & Fiscal 23% (2025) + YES on OBBBA HR 1 adding ~$3-4T per CBO + no BBA cosponsorship located + ILA flags 'falls short of expectations.' HARD.

1.note: TPAction Election Integrity 100% — implies SAVE Act / proof-of-citizenship support per TP scoring matrix. SOFT.

0.note: Campaign 'end illegal immigration'; TPAction Border 100%; serves on Homeland Security Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Protection subcommittee. SOFT.
Cosponsor HR 38 Constitutional Concealed Carry Reciprocity Act of 2025 (119th). SOFT.

1.note: TPAction 2A subscore 100%; NRA-PVF endorsed; CRPA endorsed; lifetime NRA member per Wikipedia bio. HARD.

3.note: AIPAC officially endorsed + >$50K AIPAC-affiliated PAC giving per TrackAIPAC + public 'We stand with Israel' messaging. HARD.

0.note: As Assemblymember AUTHORED AB 1064 signed Newsom Oct 8 2021 expanding pharmacist authority to independently initiate + administer any FDA-approved vaccine with ACIP recommendation (age 3+) without prescriber protocol — pro-access posture, not informed-consent. SOFT-FALSE.

set.office: U.S. Representative CA-21 (sworn in Jan 3, 2005 · 11th term · 2026 reelection · former Blue Dog Coalition Communications/Admin/Policy Chair · Ranking Member House Ag Livestock/Dairy/Poultry)

profile.religion: Roman Catholic (per Pew Faith on the Hill across multiple Congresses; Wikipedia describes him 'a liberal Catholic who favors abortion rights')
profile.background: James Manuel Costa, born April 13 1952 Fresno CA. Portuguese-Azorean third-generation dairy farmer; San Joaquin Memorial HS 1970; BA Political Science CSU Fresno 1974. CA Assembly 1978-1994 (elected at 26 — sponsored Costa-Hawkins Rental Housing Act); CA Senate 1994-2002; President NCSL 2000-01. U.S. House: old CA-20 (2005-2013), CA-16 (2013-2023), CA-21 (2023-present). Eloped with Kelsey end of 2020. Family dairy operation defaulted on ~$9M loan + seized by bank June 2018. 119th committees: Agriculture (Ranking Member Livestock/Dairy/Poultry + Forestry/Horticulture); Foreign Affairs (Europe subcommittee). Caucuses: Blue Dog Coalition + New Democrat Coalition + Problem Solvers + Hispanic Caucus + Portuguese Caucus (co-chair) + Equality Caucus + Crime Survivors/Justice Caucus (co-founder) + Ukraine Caucus + Taiwan Caucus.

jim-costa.notes_set: Heritage Action 119th 0% / lifetime 9% (118th 5%, 117th 0%, 112th 22%). ILA 2025 30.77 / lifetime ~18%. NumbersUSA F career / 117th F-. NRLC 20% historical. Equality California 100% (2018, 2019; endorsed 2020). PPAF endorsed 2026. Multi-decade D-line voting with Blue Dog crossovers DOCUMENTED but most don't map cleanly to TRUE direction cells: Laken Riley HR 29 YES Jan 7 2025 = detention not deportation; Saudi/Yemen 2018 YES to BLOCK war-powers vote = anti-Article-I-restraint (FALSE); Iran June 2026 = co-introduced WEAK ALTERNATIVE resolution with Gottheimer permitting ~one-month Iran hostilities (Common Dreams + Hill coverage) = NOT the restraint resolution (FALSE on q0); PLCAA 2005 YES to gun-maker civil immunity (historical, pre-rubric era); Secure Fence Act 2006 + Minuteman 2006 = historical, contradicted by current Dream Act sponsorship; Al Green censure Mar 6 2025 YES (1 of 10 Ds) + DC criminal code rejection Feb 9 2023 + Keystone XL 2015. HARD-FALSE life: opposed Dobbs ('strips women of their freedom'); WHPA HR 3755 117th original cosponsor; NO on HR 3 No Taxpayer Funding for Abortion Act 2011; YES expanding embryonic stem-cell research Jan 2007 + May 2005; PPAF endorsed 2026 + NARAL endorsement history. HARD-FALSE marriage: 2006 NO on constitutional 1m1w marriage amendment + Equality CA 100% 2018/2019/endorsed 2020 + Equality Act HR 5 cosponsor (117th) + RFMA HR 8404 YES + Equality Caucus member + 2007 YES SOGI job nondiscrimination + 2009 YES anti-gay hate crimes. SOFT-FALSE family q2: NO on HR 5 Parents Bill of Rights Roll Call 161 Mar 24 2023 (D-bloc Nay) + Equality Act cosponsor codifies SOGI in K-12. SOFT-FALSE christian_liberty q2: Equality Act cosponsor extends SOGI compelled-speech regimes into employment/education. SOFT-FALSE election q1+q2+q3: cosponsored John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act / Freedom to Vote Act + voted to pass bundling (expands automatic + same-day registration + mail-ballot access). HARD-FALSE border q1: original cosponsor American Dream and Promise Act HR 6 (Dreamer pathway) + Farmworker Modernization Act. HARD-FALSE self-defense q0: supports universal background checks + sponsored bill mandating background checks on private transfers Mar 2021. HARD-FALSE self-defense q1: original cosponsor AWB Act 2021 + voted for HR 2377 Federal Extreme Risk Protection Order Act (federal red-flag) + YES on Bipartisan Safer Communities Act 2022. SOFT-FALSE foreign_policy q0: June 2026 co-introduced WEAK ALTERNATIVE Iran war-powers resolution with Gottheimer/Cuellar/Landsman/Panetta permitting ~one-month hostilities — Blue Dog crossover deferring to executive war-making, contrary to Article-I restraint. HARD-FALSE q1: 1 of only 5 Ds joining all Rs to BLOCK Yemen War Powers vote 2018 (Newsweek + Wikipedia). SOFT-FALSE q2: Israel post-Oct-7 aid YES + Feb 2023 F-16s-to-Ukraine letter signatory + Saudi/Ukraine aid pattern. SOFT-FALSE q4: Congressional Ukraine Caucus + Yalta European Strategy regular + Verkhovna Rada Honorary Diploma 2024 — supranational/NATO-expansion alignment. **HARD-FALSE industry_capture q0**: Aug 2021 'Costa: Unvaccinated, Do Your Part' press conference urging mandatory vaccinations + regular testing + mask mandates (costa.house.gov press release). SOFT-FALSE q3: cosponsored ACRE Act stripping CERCLA from farmland + shielding farmers from CWA (industry-protective for Big Dairy/Big Ag, not family-farm/raw-milk direction).

set.office: U.S. Representative CA-22 (sworn in Jan 3, 2013 · 6th term · 2026 reelection · Chair Republican Governance Group/RG2 Dec 2024)

profile.religion: Roman Catholic (per Pew Faith on the Hill 119th member list + CatholicVote.org scorer profile)
profile.background: David Goncalves Valadao, born April 14 1977 Hanford CA. Portuguese-American Azorean immigrant family; fluent Portuguese + Spanish. Married high-school sweetheart Terra 1999; three children; Hanford CA. Hanford HS 1995; College of the Sequoias part-time 1996-1998 (no degree). Co-partner Valadao Dairy (1992); family operation faced ~$9M loan default 2018 + bank seized June 2018 + $325K wage-violation settlement unpaid via bankruptcy. CA Assembly District 30 (2010-2012; def. Fran Florez 61-39). U.S. House: elected 2012 (CA-21), lost to TJ Cox 2018, won back 2020, reelected 2022 (CA-22 redistricted) + 2024. 119th committees: Appropriations (3 subcomm) + previously Budget. Caucus memberships: **Chairman Republican Governance Group (RG2/Tuesday Group) Dec 2024** explicit moderate-GOP caucus + Republican Main Street Partnership + Problem Solvers + Climate Solutions + Congressional Armenian Issues (co-chair) + American Sikh (co-chair) + Western Caucus.

david-valadao.notes_set: Heritage Action 119th 46% / lifetime 47% — **bottom-quartile R caucus** (117th 74% for context). The New American Freedom Index lifetime 48% (119th 60% / 118th 35% / 117th 63%). SBA Pro-Life A+ + RFFA 0%. NumbersUSA D+. NRA-PVF historically endorsed 2016. **Chairman Republican Governance Group (RG2)** — explicit moderate-GOP caucus chairmanship elected Dec 2024. Multiple CROSS-PARTY DEVIATIONS DOCUMENTED: (a) RFMA HR 8404 YES Roll Call 373 July 19 2022 (1 of 47 R crossovers) federalizing SSM; (b) Trump 2nd impeachment YES Jan 13 2021 (1 of only 10 House R impeach voters) — cited Trump rhetoric as 'un-American, abhorrent, and absolutely an impeachable offense'; (c) DIGNIDAD Act 2025 HR 4393 cosponsor pathway to legal status for ~10-12M illegal immigrants + voted AGAINST 2014 GOP DACA dismantling + YES Dream and Promise + YES Farm Workforce Modernization + June 2018 family-separation opposition; (d) Pro-IVF on the record (debate quote 'I do support IVF'); (e) Removed cosponsorship from Life at Conception Act in 2024 during competitive race (Ms. Magazine + 19th News); (f) Refused federal 15-week abortion ban ('left up to the state'); (g) OBBBA YES July 3 2025 RC 173 218-214 despite signing April 2025 letter against deep Medicaid cuts (key swing vote in highest-Medicaid-enrollment R district at 64%); (h) Mayorkas impeachment YES Feb 2024 (with R majority). HARD-TRUE life q0 debate quote 'I am pro-life. I do support the exceptions. Rape, incest, the life of the mother. And I do support IVF' + SBA A+. SOFT-FALSE life q1 refused federal 15-week ban + dropped Life at Conception cosponsorship 2024. **HARD-FALSE life q2** pro-IVF on the record (embryo creation/discard implicated). SOFT-TRUE life q4 EMILY's List specifically targets him as opposition + SBA A+ + no PP/NARAL/EMILY's List PAC giving in cited sources. **HARD-FALSE biblical_marriage q0 + q1 CROSS-PARTY DEVIATION**: RFMA HR 8404 YES Roll Call 373 July 19 2022 codifying SSM federally. HARD-TRUE biblical_marriage q2: YES on HR 28 Protection of Women and Girls in Sports Act Roll Call 12 Jan 14 2025 amending Title IX to bar biological males from women's sports. SOFT-FALSE biblical_marriage q4: 2016 YES on banning LGBT-discrimination by federal contractors + RFMA YES + declined to sign 2015 Obergefell amicus (mixed; net leans FALSE on LGBTQ-promotion opposition). HARD-TRUE family_child_sov q1: cosponsor + YES vote HR 5 Parents Bill of Rights Roll Call 161 Mar 24 2023. SOFT-TRUE family q2: HR 5 cosponsorship + HR 28 Title IX women's sports YES. SOFT-TRUE family q0: HR 5 includes some parental-rights notification language adjacent to school-choice posture (no direct ESA/voucher vote located; weak SOFT). SOFT-FALSE econ q2: ILA Tax & Fiscal pattern + OBBBA YES adding to deficit + no BBA cosponsorship. SOFT-TRUE election q1: HR 22 SAVE Act party-line YES inferred April 10 2025 (220-208 R-bloc passage). HARD-TRUE border q0: HR 2 Secure the Border YES Roll Call 209 May 11 2023. **HARD-FALSE border q1 CROSS-PARTY DEVIATION**: DIGNIDAD Act 2025 HR 4393 cosponsor + 2014 NO on DACA dismantling + YES Dream and Promise + YES Farm Workforce Modernization + June 2018 family-separation opposition. SOFT-TRUE border q3: HR 2 includes mandatory E-Verify (with ag carveout caveat from Farm Workforce Modernization cosponsorship). HARD-TRUE self_def q0: HR 38 Constitutional Concealed Carry Reciprocity cosponsor 119th. SOFT-TRUE self_def q1: did NOT join 8 Rs voting YES on HR 8 background checks + NRA-PVF endorsed 2016. SOFT-FALSE foreign_policy q1: Ukraine aid YES + 'stands with Ukraine' (cont supplemental Apr 2024). Iran WPR H.Con.Res.38 June 3 2026: 4 R YES were Massie/Fitzpatrick/Barrett/Davidson — Valadao NOT among them (implied NO with R majority; NULL on (9,0) per cite-only — not citing as TRUE or FALSE without confirmed roll call line).
